title: Survival Island
description: Try to survive in a world made up of islands!
body:
## Survival Island 

Adds a world type where the entire world is made up of islands! In the config file you can modify the island size, shape and spread. Or, you can make it generate only one island, for a truly hardcore experience. This mod runs on both Fabric and Forge. 

### Discord Server

https://discord.gg/EwQmvQtshV
